name: Kids' Sports Bamboo Melamine Cereal Bowl - Pillowfort™
description: Make everyday meals fun for the sports fan by serving them in the Sports Bamboo Melamine Cereal Bowl from Pillowfort™. This round cereal bowl features football, basketball, and other sports printed on the exterior to get them extra excited about their favorite food. Made from bamboo melamine, this cereal bowl is BPA-free to make it great for everyday use, and it is dishwasher-safe for easy cleanup after use.
